_comment: Manual baseline produced by worker-27 (claude-sonnet-4-6) on 2026-04-23. run_loop.py unavailable. Each predicted_trigger determined by reasoning about the arc-assess description: 'Codebase discovery and migration', 'scan a project for product-direction content', 'set up arc', 'import existing docs', 'migrate our backlog', 'scan the repo for product content'. One-time or periodic consolidation; run before /arc-capture or /arc-shape on new project.

results.query: Scan the codebase and migrate ideas into Arc
results.notes: Exact 'scan' + 'migrate' verbs match description trigger phrases.

results.query: We're starting to use Arc — consolidate existing ideas
results.notes: Arc adoption + consolidation of existing ideas matches description's adoption-time scenario.

results.query: Check if there's scattered roadmap content
results.notes: Scattered-content discovery matches description's core scan behavior.

results.query: We just installed Arc — pull in whatever product stuff is already in the repo
results.notes: Adoption-time assess. 'Just installed Arc' + 'pull in' is strong signal.

results.query: Round up the TODOs and feature lists scattered across the docs folder
results.notes: 'Round up scattered' matches description's scattered-content import.

results.query: Sweep the project for product-direction notes and bring them into the backlog
results.notes: 'Sweep the project' + 'product-direction' is strong assess signal.

results.query: Import scattered feature requests from README and docs/ into Arc artifacts
results.notes: Explicit import from scattered sources. Description mentions README and docs/.

results.query: Run a one-time migration pass now that we're adopting Arc
results.notes: One-time periodic migration explicitly mentioned in description.

results.query: Look for roadmap, customer, and vision content elsewhere in the repo
results.notes: CUSTOMER/VISION/ROADMAP discovery is explicitly in arc-assess scope.

results.query: Bootstrap BACKLOG and VISION from existing project content
results.notes: BACKLOG + VISION scaffolding from existing sources matches assess produces.

results.query: Record this new idea
results.notes: Single-idea capture routes to arc-capture. Not a migration sweep.

results.query: Update the README
results.notes: README management routes to arc-sync. Description alternates list arc-sync.

results.query: Audit the backlog for stale items
results.notes: Diagnostic sweep routes to arc-audit.

results.query: Capture a single new idea I just thought of
results.notes: Single entry routes to arc-capture.

results.query: Shape the top three captured ideas into briefs
results.notes: Refinement routes to arc-shape.

results.query: Plan the next wave with shaped ideas
results.notes: Forward planning routes to arc-wave.

results.query: What's the current pipeline status?
results.notes: Read-only pulse routes to arc-status.

results.query: Scaffold a README from the Arc artifacts
results.notes: README scaffolding routes to arc-sync despite 'scaffold' verb.

results.query: Scan the codebase for SQL-injection vulnerabilities
results.notes: Security scanning, out-of-domain.

results.query: Migrate the database to a new schema
results.notes: Database migration, out-of-domain.
